# Extrapolation Calculator

> Free online extrapolation calculator for predicting future values using linear, exponential, polynomial, and logarithmic methods.

## Calculator
- Linear Extrapolation
- Exponential Growth Calculation
- Polynomial Trend Analysis
- Logarithmic Prediction
- Quadratic Curve Fitting
- R² Score and Confidence Metrics
- Export to CSV and PNG

## Pages
- [Calculator Homepage](https://extrapolationcalculator.com/) - Free online extrapolation calculator with multiple methods
- [Interpolation Calculator](https://extrapolationcalculator.com/interpolation/) - Free online interpolation calculator
- [Regression Calculator](https://extrapolationcalculator.com/regression/) - Free online regression analysis tool
- [About Us](https://extrapolationcalculator.com/about-us/) - About the project and team
- [Contact Us](https://extrapolationcalculator.com/contact-us/) - Contact form and information
- [Blog](https://extrapolationcalculator.com/blog/) - Articles about extrapolation methods and data analysis
- [Terms of Service](https://extrapolationcalculator.com/terms/) - Terms of service
- [Privacy Policy](https://extrapolationcalculator.com/privacy/) - Privacy policy

## Languages
Supported in: English, Hindi, Spanish, Russian, French, German, Italian, Portuguese, Bengali, Japanese, Korean, Malay, Polish, Indonesian, Arabic, Bulgarian, Turkish, Swedish

## Technical
- Built with Astro, React, Tailwind CSS
- All calculations run client-side
- No data stored on servers
- WCAG 2.1 AA accessible
